title: The Tipping Point: How Little Things Can Make a Big Difference
author: Malcolm Gladwell
targetAudience: Individuals interested in psychology, marketing, and social sciences
relatedBooks: Freakonomics by Steven D. Levitt and Stephen J. Dubner
